blended.narrative: Poley Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 46°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 3.8" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 52°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
